records.name: screenpipe
records.description: Local-first screen and audio capture for Hermes long-term memory — records what you've seen, said, and heard. Connects over MCP with search, activity summaries, meeting detection.

records.name: mistral-mcp
records.description: MCP server wrapping the full Mistral AI surface — chat, embeddings, vision, OCR, Voxtral audio, Codestral FIM, agents, moderation, classification, files, batch. 22 tools.

records.name: not-human-search
records.description: MCP server for discovering other MCP servers — indexes 8600+ agent-friendly sites with agentic scoring, category filters, live JSON-RPC verification.

records.name: hermes-council
records.description: Adversarial multi-perspective council MCP server — multiple AI viewpoints debate before the agent commits to a decision.

records.name: MeiGen-AI-Design
records.description: AI image and video generation across 9 leading models plus local ComfyUI. Three backend modes: MeiGen cloud, OpenAI-compatible API, or fully offline.

records.name: PipRail
records.description: Budget-bound x402 payment wallet — lets Hermes autonomously pay 402 Payment Required URLs across EVM, Solana, TON, Tron, NEAR, Sui, Aptos, etc.
